    abstract void
    Agent.afterGameEnds(RecursiveTicTacToeGame.RecursiveTicTacToeGameView game)
    An abstract method that child classes must override.

    abstract Pair<Coordinate,Coordinate>
    Agent.makeFirstMove(RecursiveTicTacToeGame.RecursiveTicTacToeGameView game)
    An abstract method that child classes must override.
    Pair<Coordinate,Coordinate>
    RandomAgent.makeFirstMove(RecursiveTicTacToeGame.RecursiveTicTacToeGameView game)
     
    final Pair<Coordinate,Coordinate>
    SearchAgent.makeFirstMove(RecursiveTicTacToeGame.RecursiveTicTacToeGameView game)
    A method to calculate the first move of the game which contains two decisions: the @{link Coordinate} of the "inner" game to select and then the Coordinate of the square on that "inner" game to mark.
    abstract Coordinate
    Agent.makeOtherMove(RecursiveTicTacToeGame.RecursiveTicTacToeGameView game)
    A n abstract method that child classes must override.
    Coordinate
    RandomAgent.makeOtherMove(RecursiveTicTacToeGame.RecursiveTicTacToeGameView game)
     
    final Coordinate
    SearchAgent.makeOtherMove(RecursiveTicTacToeGame.RecursiveTicTacToeGameView game)
    A method to calculate the move to make when this is not the first move in the game.

    Methods in edu.bu.labs.rttt.game that return RecursiveTicTacToeGame.RecursiveTicTacToeGameView
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    RecursiveTicTacToeGame.RecursiveTicTacToeGameView
    RecursiveTicTacToeGame.RecursiveTicTacToeGameView.applyFirstMove(Coordinate gameCoord, Coordinate moveCoord)
    A method to apply the provided move (e.g. the Coordinate the current player wants to mark) on the "inner" game located at the other provided Coordinate.
    RecursiveTicTacToeGame.RecursiveTicTacToeGameView
    RecursiveTicTacToeGame.RecursiveTicTacToeGameView.applyMove(Coordinate moveCoord)
    A method to apply the provided move (e.g. the Coordinate the current player wants to mark) on the current "inner" game.
    RecursiveTicTacToeGame.RecursiveTicTacToeGameView
